---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new function or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: Medjumanne
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of the problem (e.g. "I always have to
manually do X before calling Y…").

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like. If you have an idea for the function
signature, include a sketch:

```r
# Example of what the new function might look like
new_function(polygons_sf, ..., output = "sf")
```

## Scientific motivation

If this is a new clustering method or spatial analysis technique, include a
reference:

> Author et al. (year). Title. *Journal*, vol(issue), pages.
> https://doi.org/...

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context

Any other information, screenshots, or example outputs that would help.
